prestazioni: Engine: 6.75L L410 V8 (Bentley's bespoke pushrod OHV, code-named 'Mulsanne-era L-series') with forged internals upgrade via Cosworth pistons (9.5:1 CR), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Bryant Racing. Twin Precision Turbo PT6266 CEA turbos (62mm inducer, 66mm exducer) with TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates and custom 3.5" stainless steel turbo manifolds by GReddy Performance Products, feeding into a custom 4.5" titanium exhaust system with Akrapovič Racing Line mufflers and electronically controlled bypass valves for variable backpressure.

Fuel System: Full Motec M150 ECU with bespoke calibration for flex-fuel E85 compatibility, paired with a Radium Engineering dual-pump fuel surge tank (2x Walbro 525LPH pumps) and Injector Dynamics ID2600x injectors. Custom CNC-machined fuel rails by AEM Electronics with -8AN ORB fittings and a 1200hp-capable fuel system upgrade, including a Fore Innovations F2i-1000 fuel pressure regulator.

Suspension & Handling: Full air ride conversion via Air Lift Performance 3P management system with custom-valved AccuAir ENDO-CVT compressors, paired with KW Automotive Clubsport coilover sleeves (adjustable damping) and bespoke anti-roll bars by H&R (28mm front, 25mm rear). Chassis reinforcement via a custom subframe brace by Cusco and polyurethane bushings from SuperPro (part #SPF0114K) for the rear trailing arms. Brembo GT-R 6-piston calipers (405mm front rotors) with carbon-ceramic brake pads by Pagid Racing (RS14 compound) and stainless steel brake lines by Goodridge.
estetica: Exterior: Full custom widebody conversion by Liberty Walk (LB-WORKS Bentley Mulsanne kit, modified for limousine proportions) with carbon fiber fenders, front splitter, and rear diffuser by 996TT Carbon. Custom 22" forged wheels by HRE (FF16 model, 9.5" front / 11.5" rear) with a gold-bronze finish and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 315/25 rear). Full PPF (XPEL Ultimate Plus) with a custom matte clear bra wrap by Avery Dennison (Matte Black Metallic, SW9000).

Interior: Full reupholstery by Saddleback Leather (hand-stitched Bridge of Weir leather, diamond-quilted pattern) with Alcantara headliner and custom embroidery (royal crest on headrests). Bespoke rear compartment upgrades including a champagne chiller by Dometic (model CFX3 75DZ) with Baccarat crystal flutes, a 4K OLED screen by LG (model 55E6P) with a custom motorized lift system by Voxx International, and a Bang & Olufsen Beosound Stage sound system with 18 speakers (including 2x 21" subwoofers in custom enclosures).

Lighting & Electronics: Full LED conversion by Osram (Night Breaker Laser bulbs for headlights, 6000K) with custom adaptive laser modules by Hella (Solid State Laser, 500m range). Custom DRLs by Diode Dynamics (Cobra series, amber turn signals) and a full RGB underglow kit by Oracle Lighting (model 6872-007, synchronized with the infotainment system). Retrofitted Bentley Rotating Display (from newer models) with a custom CNC-machined aluminum bezel by 3D Carbon.
